ZEPHYRSQUALL-ANEMOMETER.flavor: It's always spinning, measuring a wind that isn't there.
ZEPHYRSQUALL-ANEMOMETER.title: Anemometer
ZEPHYRSQUALL-CHAIN.description: Cards containing "Combo" hit an additional time.
ZEPHYRSQUALL-CHAIN.flavor: It inexplicably helps with stringing together attacks.
ZEPHYRSQUALL-CHAIN.title: Chain
ZEPHYRSQUALL-CURSED_TOME.description: You can now [gold]Record[/gold] Statuses, Curses, and Quests.
ZEPHYRSQUALL-CURSED_TOME.title: Cursed Tome
ZEPHYRSQUALL-FIELD_JOURNAL.description: At the start of each combat, add [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:Analysis|Analyses}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
ZEPHYRSQUALL-FIELD_JOURNAL.flavor: "Let's see what mysteries this Spire holds."
ZEPHYRSQUALL-FIELD_JOURNAL.title: Field Journal
ZEPHYRSQUALL-SPIRE_ENCYCLOPEDIA.descript: At the start of each combat, add [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:Analysis|Analyses}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
ZEPHYRSQUALL-SPIRE_ENCYCLOPEDIA.flavor: "Fascinating! I wonder who architected such a place?"
ZEPHYRSQUALL-SPIRE_ENCYCLOPEDIA.title: Spire Encyclopedia
ZEPHYRSQUALL-RESEARCH_PAPER.description: Whenever you [gold]Record[/gold] a card, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it for the remainder of combat.
ZEPHYRSQUALL-RESEARCH_PAPER.flavor: An incredibly detailed analysis of the horrific Spireblight.
ZEPHYRSQUALL-RESEARCH_PAPER.title: Research Paper
